headline: Experienced Managing Director @ Daktronics | New Business Development
summary:
I'm Patrick Halliwell, the Managing Director at Daktronics UK Ltd, a leading brand in the UK's LED display industry. With over 19 years of experience in this field, I've developed and executed successful sales and development strategies across Europe, delivering high-profile projects and establishing long-term partnerships with key clients and media owners.

My mission is to create superior visual experiences that enhance the impact and value of digital out-of-home advertising. I lead a talented and dedicated team that leverages cutting-edge technology, innovation, and quality to provide customised and reliable LED display solutions. I'm also passionate about learning and adapting to the changing market trends and customer needs, ensuring we stay ahead of the competition and deliver excellence.

experiences.title: Managing Director
experiences.description: As Managing Director for Daktroncis UK, I am focused on the development and sales strategy  of the company across Europe. I have been with Daktronics since 2004, starting as a technical director for a year before taking over the MD position. I have worked closely with Daktronics’ key accounts in Europe including, Westfield Shopping centres and world leading media owners such as JCDecaux. Having delivered high profile projects in London, including the iconic Piccadilly Circus, where Daktronics has installed three giant displays and Gatwick North and South terminal, I know what it takes to have an impact-full DOOH installation. Airports is a strong expanding sector for Daktronics, our flagship installation is the Tom Bradley International Terminal at LAX - Los Angeles, USA. Knowing the importance of networking, I spend a number of weeks a year visiting trade shows and events to maintain a broad industry knowledge in order to offer that experience to the Daktronics customers.

recommendations:
Lucy Ponsillo (LLB Hons)

Patrick is great to work for. He is always positive and adds guidance and encouragement to me as his employee. Recommendations for procedural development are always received with enthusiasm and collaboration.

Geny Caloisi

Patrick is an excellent manager. He is open and very hard working. Always in a good mood Patrick tackles any obstacle with grace and determination achieving great results. I have enjoyed working with Patrick enormously.
